zh.lifeSummary: 當Graf Ernst von Gleichen I於大約1096年出生在德國時，他的父親Erwin von Gleichen Tonna I28歲，母親Grafin Helenburg von Lohbra23歲。他於大約1124年與n.n.結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1151年12月29日在他的家鄉享年56歲。

nameMeanings.name: von
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Cambodian: written វ៉ុន, unexplained.

variants.name: Vaughan
meanings: Welsh: from fychan, a lenited form of bychan, a diminutive of bach ‘little’. This was often used to distinguish the younger of two bearers of the same personal name, typically the son of a father with the same name.

nameMeanings.name: Gleichen
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: German: occupational name for an iron worker who flattened out the metal into sheets, from an agent derivative of Middle High German gelīchen ‘to smooth or even out’.
Jewish (Ashkenazic): from the inflected form of German gleich ‘same’, one of names from vocabulary words that were selected at random by government officials when surnames were made compulsory.

nameMeanings.name: Ernst
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: from ern(e)st ‘serious business, fight to the death’.

en.lifeSummary: When Graf Ernst von Gleichen I was born about 1096, in Germany, his father, Erwin von Gleichen Tonna I, was 28 and his mother, Grafin Helenburg von Lohbra, was 23. He married n.n. about 1124. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 1 daughter. He died on 29 December 1151, in his hometown, at the age of 56.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Graf Ernst von Gleichen I est né environ 1096, à Allemagne, son père, Erwin von Gleichen Tonna I, avait 28 ans et sa mère, Grafin Helenburg von Lohbra, avait 23 ans. Il a épousé n.n. environ 1124. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé le 29 décembre 1151, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 56 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Graf Ernst von Gleichen I um 1096 in Deutschland geboren wurde, war sein Vater Erwin von Gleichen Tonna I 28 und seine Mutter Grafin Helenburg von Lohbra 23. Er hat um 1124 n.n. geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb am 29. Dezember 1151 im Alter von 56 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Graf Ernst von Gleichen I è nato il circa 1096 nel Germania, il suo padre, Erwin von Gleichen Tonna I, aveva 28 anni e il suo madre, Grafin Helenburg von Lohbra, aveva 23 anni. Lui sposato n.n. circa 1124. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 1 figlia. Morì il 29 dicembre 1151, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 56 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Graf Ernst von Gleichen Iが約1096年にドイツで生まれた時，父Erwin von Gleichen Tonna Iは28歳，母Grafin Helenburg von Lohbraは23歳であった。約1124年にn.n.と結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1151年12月29日に故郷で56歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Graf Ernst von Gleichen I(이)가 대략 1096년 독일에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Erwin von Gleichen Tonna I(은)는 28세였고, 그의 어머니 Grafin Helenburg von Lohbra(은)는 23세였다. 그는 대략 1124년 n.n.(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1151년 12월 29일 그의 고향에서 56세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Graf Ernst von Gleichen I nasceu aproximadamente 1096, em Alemanha, seu pai, Erwin von Gleichen Tonna I, tinha 28 anos e sua mãe, Grafin Helenburg von Lohbra, tinha 23 anos. Ele casou-se com n.n. aproximadamente 1124. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 29 de dezembro de 1151, em sua cidade natal, com 56 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Graf Ernst von Gleichen I родился около 1096 г. в местности Германия, его отцу по имени Erwin von Gleichen Tonna I было 28 лет, а матери, которую звали Grafin Helenburg von Lohbra, 23. Он женился на женщине по имени n.n. около 1124 г. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 1 дочь. Он умер 29 декабря 1151 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 56 лет.

Se casó con n.n. aproximadamente 1124. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 1 hija. Murió el 29 de diciembre de 1151, en su pueblo, a la edad de 56 años.
